pr_title: fix: remove template-lock phrase and deduplicate examples
pr_description: B1**: Replace the third `review_lever` example in the system prompt to remove the lockable phrase "the options neglect" — confirmed source of llama3.1 secondary template lock (100% gta_game, 92% parasomnia in run 96). B2**: Remove duplicate examples from the `Lever` Pydantic field description, keeping them only in the system prompt. Since llama_index serializes the full Pydantic schema, every LLM call previously received the examples twice (~150-200 wasted tokens, doubled copyable-phrase signal).
